2298810.name: Desperate Skeleton
2298810.description:
Desperate Skeleton is an 3D fantasy third-person rougelike game full of fighting, dodging and magic.

You play as the desperate Skeleton an reeincarnated skeleton who is currently deep in an mysterious dungeon only equiped with a sword and an unusual skill.
The desperate Skeleton needs to learn how to use this skill to his advantage and take down enemies willing to take you down and hopefully escape to the overworld before anything happens.

Go and explore the mysterious Dungeon where Enemies use everything in their might to take you down.

Key Features:

  • Procedural Generation:

    You can choose a seed to generate a random dungeon with random rooms, events and enemies.

  • Boss Fighting:

    Fight various Bosses in Eventrooms or at the end of every stage.

  • Fighting:

    Fight with different Weapons and styles like swords and magic.

  • Skills:

    Skills are a essential part of the game. You can get Skills from fallen enemies.
2298810.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
